errors.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
errors.errorBoundaryDesc: Something went wrong. Please try reloading the page.

landing.heroTitle: Build your SaaS in record time
landing.heroSubtitle: A production-ready full-stack template with authentication, payments, and everything you need to launch fast.
landing.featuresFastDesc: Built with Hono and Vite for blazing-fast development and production performance.
landing.featuresAuthDesc: Better Auth with social logins, sessions, and role-based access out of the box.
landing.featuresPaymentsDesc: Stripe integration with subscriptions, credit packages, and webhook handling.
landing.featuresUIDesc: shadcn/ui components with dark mode, responsive design, and smooth animations.
landing.featuresTypeSafeDesc: End-to-end TypeScript with Hono RPC, Zod validation, and shared schemas.
landing.featuresDeployDesc: Production-ready with Docker, health checks, graceful shutdown, and more.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Start building your next SaaS product today. No complex setup, just clone and go.
landing.pricingSubtitle: Pay for what you use. No hidden fees, no subscriptions.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Select the perfect plan for your needs
pricing.creditPackagesSubtitle: Need more credits? Purchase a one-time pack.
pricing.faqCreditsAnswer: Credits are used to access AI-powered features. Different actions consume different amounts of credits.
pricing.faqExpireAnswer: Daily credits reset at UTC midnight. Subscription credits reset on renewal. Purchased bonus credits never expire.
pricing.faqUpgradeAnswer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
pricing.faqRefundAnswer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all subscription plans. Credit package purchases are non-refundable.

footer.description: Build your next SaaS faster with our production-ready template.
